ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the player participates in */,
  "position_id" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "retire_year" INTEGER /* Year the player retired */,
  "retire_age" INTEGER /* Age at which the player retired */,
  "years_played" INTEGER /* Number of years the player played professionally */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Injury history of the player */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's current agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., MLB, NBA) */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., Major League Baseball) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the sport is primarily played */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "championship_name" TEXT /* Name of the championship or major trophy in the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., G_p, G_if) */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the position is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "primary_position" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the position is the player's primary position */,
  "secondary_position" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the position is a secondary position the player can play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player who signed the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player signed with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "performance_bonus" REAL /* Performance bonus included in the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., standard, incentive-based) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., active, expired, terminated) */,
  "option_years" INTEGER /* Number of option years in the contract */,
  "buyout_clause" REAL /* Amount required to buy out the contract */,
  "incentives" TEXT /* Detailed description of any additional incentives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., batting average, goals scored) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., offensive, defensive, physical) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the agent works for */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agent's office */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the agent's company website */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_agents" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-agent relationship */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "reason_for_termination" TEXT /* Reason for the termination of the relationship, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_agents_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_agents_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
